allow: PowerShell(Get-Command fnm, volta, nvm, bun, deno -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Name, Source; Test-Path "$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe"; Test-Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\nvs"; Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Packages" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell($hits = @\(\); foreach \($root in @\("C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft Visual Studio", "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft Visual Studio", "C:\\BuildTools", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\VisualStudio"\)\) { if \(Test-Path $root\) { $hits += Get-ChildItem $root -Recurse -Filter "cl.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName } }; $hits; "---"; rustup toolchain list; "---"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Windows Kits\\10\\Lib" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
